notes: FULL public+private stage-1 board run. Dev probe (n=200, see notes.md results) gave FF +3pp / 0 a/b echoes / 2 verified per-case exact-fraction recoveries — ambiguous-pass signal, mechanism present but smaller addressable set on pass-2 than pass-4. Single variable vs exp_017 (pass-2 stage-1, original prompts): the FF-precision SYSTEM_PROMPT_MATH (byte-identical to exp_030). MCQ prompt, few-shots, sampling, vLLM sizing all identical. Submit stage-1 raw to board as discriminator vs exp_017's 0.586 stage-1 floor; if board shows lift, follow-up = layer exp_018 rescue config on these responses (exp_034) for head-to-head vs the 0.628 champion. Why pass-2 not pass-4 (exp_025): rescue is non-additive — pass-4 full-stack (0.621) is below pass-2 full-stack (0.628) because rescue is tuned to pass-2's residuals, so the champion's base must stay pass-2.
